channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Iran Vows Not to Surrender After Week of War That’s Shaken World - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. Iran Vows Not to Surrender After Week of War That’s Shaken World  Bloomberg.com
  2. Live updates: Trump signals he will escalate war with Iran as Tehran apologises to neighbors for strikes  CNN
  3. Trump threatens ‘very hard’ expanded strikes; Iran vows never to surrender  Al Jazeera
  4. Live updates: Fighting continues across the Middle East as plane carrying fallen U.S. troops arrives at Dover  NBC News
  5. Trump Demands ‘Unconditional Surrender’ by Iran, Shifting U.S. Objectives Again  The New York Times

item.description:

item.title: The US is sending a new drone-killer to the Middle East. It's logged over 1,000 Shahed intercepts over Ukraine. - Business Insider
item.description:
1. The US is sending a new drone-killer to the Middle East. It's logged over 1,000 Shahed intercepts over Ukraine.  Business Insider

  4. US and Gulf need Ukraine's interceptor drones, but Kyiv banned weapons exports after Russia invasion  Fortune
